commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human maintainer/contributor action is needed because the blocker is a security-sensitive solution-direction issue plus missing external real behavior proof, not a safe automated repair loop.; Needs attention: the diff expands SecretRef resolution to Feishu media payload strings, a non-credential input surface.; Review finding: [P1] Keep reply media out of SecretRef resolution — extensions/feishu/src/media.ts... (sha=4959c7deb6ee3ba5165aba1268ed7ae89137fad3)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Feishu media/outbound handling to resolve SecretRef-shaped media URLs before loading, sending cards, and redacting fallback text, with Feishu media/outbound tests.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +164. Total +263 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect from source: the patch runs mediaUrl through SecretRef resolution before loadWebMedia. The linked Feishu tenant regression has concrete steps, but this read-only review did not run a live Feishu/Keychain scenario.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer/contributor action is needed because the blocker is a security-sensitive solution-direction issue plus missing external real behavior proof, not a safe automated repair loop.

target.title: fix(feishu): resolve SecretRef media before upload
target.body:
## Summary
- resolve Feishu media SecretRef inputs before media loading and upload routing
- resolve payload/native-card media URLs before sending follow-up cards
- avoid exposing SecretRef media values in comment-thread fallback text or upload-failure link fallback

Fixes #89338.

## Validation
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/media.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-utils.secret-resolution.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
target.author: pluviobyte

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
